title: NGC 7647
summary: NGC 7647 is a giant elliptical galaxy of type cD located in the constellation Pegasus. The redshift of the galaxy is (z) 0.041 and it was discovered on November 29, 1785 by the astronomer William Herschel.
text:
NGC 7647 is a giant elliptical galaxy of type cD located in the constellation Pegasus. The redshift of the galaxy is (z) 0.041 and it was discovered on November 29, 1785 by the astronomer William Herschel.

Supernova
One supernova has been observed in NGC 7647: SN 2009hi (Type Ia, mag. 18.0) was discovered by Kōichi Itagaki, and independently by the Lick Observatory Supernova Search (LOSS), on 10 July 2009.
